_curation_status: SEED_ONLY — 4 representative cases. Production target: 30 query→relevant-jobs golden tuples per docs/ai-implementation-plan.md ticket 1.1.4. Ranking quality (NDCG@10 vs keyword) is the eval metric, not score-band agreement, so the suite contract differs from candidate_scoring.
description: Semantic job search golden cases. Each case ties a free-text query to the set of job IDs that should rank in the top-K, with optional positional weights for NDCG calculation.

cases.description: User searching for California telehealth roles — vector + keyword should both hit
Niche specialty query — vector should outperform keyword by recognizing semantic kinship
Dementia care — should match geriatric psychiatry roles even without exact keyword
Higher specialty bar — fellowship-trained PMHNPs in addiction psych
